title: eugenia heynei
intro: Eugenia heynei, also known as the Heyne's Eugenia or Malabar Murraya, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eugenia heynei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. Eugenia heynei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
